_comment: Trigger evals for the framework-modernizer dispatch description per agentskills.io optimizing-descriptions spec. ~20 queries split 60/40 train/val. Validation split is the ship gate: ≥0.5 trigger rate on should-trigger AND <0.5 trigger rate on near-miss should-NOT-trigger. Run via the harness's dispatcher (NOT the skill body) — the question is whether the description matches.

should_trigger.query: Our app uses app.del — is that still ok in modern express?
Path-to-regexp is showing warnings about :id? — what changed?
Major dependabot PR open: express ^4 → ^5. Is it safe to merge?
What breaks if we go from express 4 to 5?
Need a migration plan for express 5 upgrade

should_not_trigger.reason: patch within 4.x — not a major migration

should_not_trigger.query: Why is express slow under load?
Express vs Fastify — which to choose for a new project?
Run npm audit on our express app
Express app has a memory leak — help debug

ship_gate._comment: Validation split is the gate. Train split is for description tuning iterations.
